case_title: DANIEL W. WHITTAKER VS. STANLEY LEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITTAKER, DANIEL W. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $228.29 FILED BY WHITTAKER, DANIEL W. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STANLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. "DEFENDANT PAID BY CHECK HERE IN COURT $200.13 INTEREST ON PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
